title: Polychron Feedback Topology
description: A machine-readable map of the closed loops, firewalls, and emergence boundaries governing the polychron composition engine.

CONDUCTOR_BLINDNESS.description: Cross-layer coordination affects local probability but cannot inject signals directly into the conductor. Conductor is insulated from structural micro-adjustments.

SIGNAL_DELAY.description: Cross-layer queries the conductor via conductorSignalBridge, introducing a mandatory, one-beat delayed snapshot requirement.

REGISTRY_DAMPENING.description: All closed-loop feedback mechanisms must enroll through feedbackRegistry and pipelineCouplingManager to prevent resonant feedback cascades.

feedbackLoops.mechanism: closedLoopController homeostatic: observes windowed average compositeIntensity (last 5 snapshots), targets piecewise ideal dynamic curve (pp-ff arch peaking at 70% macro position). Gain 0.25, clamp [0.9, 1.15]. Registered as tensionBias in conductorIntelligence.

Custom homeostatic: 16-beat rolling window compares actual vs intended note emission ratios. Phase-aware correction (stronger mid-phrase). Product-level density deficit boost (target 0.78). EMA smoothing 0.55. Anti-resonance: self-dampens 40% when conductor regulation pushes same direction. Clamp [0.60, 1.38]. Registered densityBias in conductorIntelligence.

closedLoopController homeostatic: observes tension product via signalReader, targets neutral 1.0 with 0.25 deadband. Gain 0.28, clamp [0.86, 1.14]. Companion density path uses attribution-driven anti-monopoly (>45% share triggers counter-bias) plus aggregate lift when density < 1.0.

Homeostatic decorrelation engine: reads full coupling matrix from systemDynamicsProfiler each beat. Per-pair adaptive correlation targets with graduated gain escalation, p95 EMA ceilings, budget scoring, and hotspot promotion. Nudges density [0.80, 1.20], tension [0.80, 1.22], flicker [0.70, 1.30] biases to decorrelate over-correlated pairs.

Multi-modal regime-conditional: per-regime directional biases (6 regimes x 3 axes) scaled by profiler curvature. Equilibrator sub-module tracks 64-beat regime share ring buffer, corrects toward budget (exploring/coherent/evolving 35/35/20%). Stagnation drift injection after 8 low-velocity beats. EMA smoothing 0.20. Density [0.88, 1.12], tension [0.88, 1.22], flicker [0.83, 1.19].

closedLoopController homeostatic: observes EMA-smoothed combined entropy (pitch 0.4, velocity 0.3, rhythm 0.3 weights, 10-note window). Target blended 45% arc curve (bell-shaped section position) + 55% intent + ~15 coupling modulations. Gain 1.3, clamp [0.3, 2.0]. Scales cross-layer module activity probabilities. Reads conductor via conductorSignalBridge (firewall-compliant).

closedLoopController sentinel: observes stutterFeedbackListener.getIntensity().overall, targets 0.3 density. Gain 0.15, smoothing 0.4, clamp [0.5, 1.5]. Primary regulation via feedbackRegistry resonance dampening (not direct bias consumption). Actual variant diversity maintained by self-balancing inverse-frequency weights in selectForBeat() (12 signal dimensions).

Meta-level perturbation: monitors Pearson correlations between all feedbackRegistry loops over 80-beat rolling window. Detects reinforcement spirals (r>0.65), tug-of-war (r<-0.65), cross-domain amplitude lock (r>0.65 for 60+ beats), and stasis (all loops near-zero for 100+ beats). Graduated interventions: scale-down, phase jitter, magnitude perturbation, random kicks. Inversely health-gated. MIN_SHUFFLE_INTERVAL=40 beats.

emergentRhythmEngine accumulates stutterContagion + emergentDownbeat + feedbackLoop L0 events into a 16-slot subdivision grid. Grid density and syncopation complexity bias getRhythm.js weight selection: high complexity -> syncopated patterns, low complexity -> steady patterns. Also posts to L0 emergentRhythm channel for crossModulateRhythms. Exploring regime 1.4x, coherent 0.5x. Registered via feedbackRegistry.registerLoop (L0-mediated signal path).

emergentDownbeat and stutterContagion L0 events modulate crossMod in crossModulateRhythms. Downbeat proximity creates micro-breathing (build→spike→dip). Stutter contagion boosts rhythmic variance. Feedback: richer crossMod → more downbeat detection → more contagion → dancing rhythm. Rate-limited by emergentDownbeat MIN_DOWNBEAT_INTERVAL_SEC and contagion decay. Registered via feedbackRegistry.registerLoop (L0-mediated signal path).

emergentMelodicEngine synthesizes 6 conductor melodic trackers (contour shape, interval freshness, tessiture pressure, thematic recall, ambitus migration, counterpoint motion) per beat. Downstream bias surfaces: nudgeNoveltyWeight() in harmonicIntervalGuard amplifies interval novelty steering when territory is stale; getMelodicWeights() adds a 12th signal dimension to stutterVariants (contour, freshness, tessiture, counterpoint each shift variant weights); getContourAscendBias() in alienArpeggio modulates pitch direction by melodic arc. Posts emergentMelody to L0 for future consumers. CIM harmonic-pitchCorrection dial scales noveltyWeight amplification authority. Registered via feedbackRegistry.registerLoop (L0-mediated signal path).

firewallPorts.mechanism: Cached beat-delayed snapshot. conductorSignalBridge.refresh() runs each beat as a registered recorder, caches signalReader/hyperMetaManager/systemDynamicsProfiler state. CrossLayer reads via getSignals().
firewallPorts.dataShape: density, tension, flicker, compositeIntensity, sectionPhase, regime, regimeProb, axisEnergyShares, couplingLabels, healthEma, systemPhase

firewallPorts.mechanism: conductorConfigDynamics.regulationTick() adjusts crossModBias and densityBias based on emission averages. Rhythm reads via getRegulationCrossModBias()/getRegulationDensityBias().
hyperMetaManager.getRateMultiplier(key) returns named multipliers that downstream modules read. 19 controllers produce multipliers consumed by rhythm, play, conductor, and crossLayer modules.
L0 (absoluteTimeGrid) named event channels. Modules post timestamped events; any module can read via getLast()/findClosest(). ~40 active channels spanning conductor, crossLayer, rhythm, play, fx.
coordinationIndependenceManager reads conductor state via conductorSignalBridge, computes 11 module-pair dials (0=independent, 1=coordinated), writes via setCoordinationScale().
explainabilityBus.emit() — exempt from all boundary rules. Diagnostic event channel for tracing signal extremes, decisions, and cross-system interactions.
crossLayerEmissionGateway.emit(sourceModule, buffer, event) — all cross-layer buffer writes route through this gateway. Prevents direct buffer.push() from crossLayer modules.
sourceModules: all crossLayer modules that emit notes/CC

firewallPorts.mechanism: conductorIntelligence.registerRecorder() — per-beat callback hook. conductorSignalBridge registers itself to get refresh(ctx) calls. Registry gate: L1-only except bridge.

crossModulateRhythms reads L0 emergentDownbeat + stutterContagion channels. Emergent downbeats create micro-breathing (build→spike→dip). Stutter contagion events boost rhythmic variance. Creates feedback loop: downbeat/stutter → crossMod → rhythm → new patterns.
